overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval-style stone courtyard garden featuring a central circular fountain, surrounded by lush vegetation and historic stone walls. Colorful butterflies flutter throughout the scene in this high-quality game engine render with overcast lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval courtyard garden with central fountain

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the tranquil courtyard garden and fountain

notable_agents.action: butterflies fluttering around the fountain and flower beds

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with tiered central spout and clear water
tall historic stone wall with decorative arched gateway
tall leafy deciduous trees surrounding the courtyard
dense patch of purple flowering plants
clusters of white flowers along the stone pathways
ornate stone lantern post at the garden edge

segments.scene_description: A peaceful medieval courtyard garden scene centered on a circular stone fountain. The area is enclosed by historic stone walls with an archway in the distance, surrounded by lush trees and flowering plants. Butterflies flutter around the fountain area while the camera remains stationary, capturing the tranquil atmosphere of this game engine environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a peaceful medieval courtyard garden that maintains a tranquil and unchanging atmosphere. It begins with a centered focus on a circular stone fountain, surrounded by lush trees and vibrant flowering plants. As butterflies flutter softly around the water feature, the camera captures the stillness of the enclosed space defined by historic stone walls. The scene remains poised in this quiet moment, extending the gaze toward a distant archway under a soft, overcast light.
